# Tekisho Infotech

> Tekisho is an enterprise AI and digital transformation company
> with offices in Hyderabad, India and Irving, Texas, USA.

## What Tekisho Does
- Generative AI and Agentic AI system development
- SAP S/4HANA implementation, migration, and support
- Cloud strategy and deployment (Azure, AWS, GCP)
- Intelligent automation and AI agents
- AI-powered cybersecurity and analytics
- Custom enterprise application development

## AI Products
- LeadQ.AI: AI lead intelligence and qualification platform
- RightDoc.AI: Intelligent document automation
- ZPOS.AI: AI-powered retail point-of-sale system
- Presence: Workforce presence and tracking solution
- Voice Agent: Autonomous AI voice communication agent

## Industries Served
Healthcare, Manufacturing, BFSI, Retail, Logistics

## Proven Results
- 35% reduction in healthcare claim denials
- 2x faster retail checkout with ZPOS.AI
- SAP S/4HANA migrations in record time
- 100+ successful enterprise digital projects

## Contact
- Website: https://tekisho.ai
- Email: contact@tekisho.ai
- Hyderabad, Telangana, India
- Irving, Texas, USA
